## Summary

Describe the squad you are adding or updating and why it belongs in Agency.

## Manifest path

- `squads/<slug>/squad.json`

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Type of change

- [ ] New squad submission
- [ ] Squad metadata update
- [ ] Site styling or layout change (major UX change)
- [ ] Schema change

## Visual review (if applicable)

For site styling or layout changes, confirm review:

- [ ] Not a major UX change, or `npm run build` + `npm run preview` were reviewed locally
- [ ] Visuals align with Bradygaster Squad docs language (white/light-neutral shell, rose primary accents, bordered surfaces, tighter radii)

## Review focus

Call out anything reviewers should pay special attention to, such as schema changes, import metadata, public links, or preview-specific UX risks. See [Bradygaster Squad docs](https://github.com/bradygaster/squad-cli) for visual system reference.
